survey.step1_title: How much do you pay in OTA commissions per month?
survey.step1_subtitle: Estimate your total monthly payment to Agoda, Booking.com, etc.
survey.step2_title: What % of your bookings come through OTAs?
survey.step2_subtitle: How dependent are you on platforms like Agoda or Booking.com?
survey.step4_title: What if your hotel became a shareholder in Staylo?
survey.step4_subtitle: Your business, your tool — imagine owning a piece of the platform that works for you.
survey.step4_hint2: in commissions — invest the equivalent of just 1 month.
survey.popup_staylo_calc: Same bookings, but only 10% instead of ~17%
survey.popup_note: This is what stays in YOUR pocket instead of going to OTA shareholders.
survey.governance_desc: Regardless of how many shares you hold. Every property gets equal voice.
survey.step5_title: Almost done! Tell us about your property.
survey.step5_subtitle: We'll contact you with next steps for becoming a founding partner.

property.error: Registration failed. Please check all required fields and try again.

dashboard.cta_become_host_sub: Become a hotelier on STAYLO — free, 15 minutes.
dashboard.kit_subtitle: Your personalized materials to grow the Staylo network
dashboard.kit_qr_desc: This QR code is on all your kit materials. Every scan is tracked to your account.
dashboard.kit_first_desc: As a Founding Partner, your personalized Welcome Kit is shipped to you at no cost. Refills are available at cost price via Print-on-Demand.
dashboard.kit_ordered_desc: Your refill kit will be printed and shipped locally. You\'ll receive a tracking number by email.
dashboard.no_properties_detail: Register your first property to get started. It only takes a few minutes.
dashboard.referrals_subtitle: Track your referrals and grow the community
dashboard.no_referrals_yet: No referrals yet. Share your link to start growing the community!
dashboard.shares_subtitle: Your founding partner status and investment details
dashboard.loi_cta_text: Ready to become a founding partner? Start by signing the Letter of Intent.
dashboard.call_confirmed_desc: A member of the Staylo team will contact you via
dashboard.call_asap_note: We\'ll try to reach you within the next 30 minutes!
dashboard.call_subtitle: To finalize your registration, we\'d love to have a quick welcome call with you. How would you prefer to be contacted?
dashboard.qr_desc_short: Print it, show it — anyone who scans is linked to you forever.
dashboard.calc_hint: Tap any number to edit and see your savings update live.
dashboard.calc_explanation: Difference between 17% OTA and 10% Staylo commission on your estimated bookings

loi.ambassador_clause_intro: As a Founding Partner, you agree to participate in the Staylo Ambassador recruitment program. This is a core part of our growth strategy and your partnership.
loi.ambassador_clause_step1_desc: You receive a free branded kit with your unique QR code: reception stand, room cards, WiFi cards, window sticker, and founding partner certificate.
loi.ambassador_clause_step2_title: QR Code on All Guest Touchpoints
loi.ambassador_clause_step2_desc: Your personalized QR code is displayed at check-out, in rooms, on invoices, and on WiFi cards. Guests scan it to discover Staylo.
loi.ambassador_clause_step3_desc: When a guest scans your QR, they get 1 free night on their first Staylo booking. If they recommend a hotel that joins, they earn 2% for life — and you helped grow the network.
loi.ambassador_clause_step4_desc: Replacement kits are available at cost via your dashboard. Print-on-demand, shipped locally — no stock needed.
loi.ambassador_clause_legal: By signing this LOI, you acknowledge that displaying the Staylo QR code at guest touchpoints is part of the founding partner agreement. This helps grow the platform organically and increases the value of your shares. The first personalized kit is provided free of charge.

booking.try_dates: Try different dates or a smaller group.
booking.guests_lower: guests. Please reduce the count or pick a larger room.
booking.fees_at_checkout: Payment processing fees added at checkout (free with Bitcoin Lightning).
booking.too_many_guests_short: Too many guests for this room
booking.slogan: Owned by Hoteliers, Built for Hospitality
booking.hero_title: Find deals on hotels, resorts & more
booking.hero_subtitle: Book directly with hoteliers — save up to 20% vs. other platforms
booking.tagline_highlight: You are not just a partner — you are the platform.
booking.tagline_body: STAYLO is the only booking platform owned and run by hoteliers.
booking.tagline_cta: Book, share, earn — build ethical passive income while growing a community that puts hospitality first.
booking.explore_desc: Explore our most booked cities by fellow travelers
booking.flagship: Flagship Property — Where It All Began
booking.commission_note: 10% commission only — the lowest in the industry

checkout.signin_desc: You need an account to complete your reservation.
checkout.err_hotelier_not_onboarded: The hotelier has not yet linked a payout account. Please try again later or contact support.
checkout.err_hotelier_inactive: The hotelier\'s payment account is not fully active yet. Your booking is on hold — please retry shortly.
checkout.no_url: Payment session could not be created. Please retry.
checkout.ref_note: Use this reference in any correspondence with the hotel or STAYLO.
checkout.transparency_note: STAYLO never marks up the room price. The processing fee covers payment gateway costs only — pay with Lightning to skip it entirely.

manage.packages_sub: Craft bundles guests can add at booking — honeymoon, wellness, retreat, diving…
manage.no_packages: No packages yet. Click "Add package" to craft your first one.
manage.team_subtitle: Add staff or co-managers to help run this property. They need a STAYLO account first.
manage.settings_subtitle: General property info that may change over time. Save commits everything at once.
manage.locked_desc: Your property has been verified by STAYLO. Legal info (name, address, contact details, policies) is now read-only.
manage.videos_subtitle: Up to 2 short videos. The first is shown as the hero on your property page. Keep them under 60 seconds for best engagement.
manage.no_videos_desc: Properties with video get up to 80% more booking enquiries. Show your rooms, common areas, and the vibe in one short clip.
manage.photos_subtitle: The first photo is the cover image shown on search results. Drag-to-reorder coming soon.
manage.no_photos_desc: Properties without photos cannot go live. Upload at least 3 high-quality images of your rooms, common areas, and views.
manage.photos_warning: Add at least 3 photos before going live
manage.price_default_hint: This is what the guest pays. You can override it per day in the Availability tab.
manage.communicating_rooms_hint: At least one pair of this room type connects through an internal door
manage.extra_bed_hint: Roll-away bed billed per night, kids only
manage.extra_bed_adults: Allow adults on the extra bed too
manage.extra_bed_adults_hint: For last-minute friends, OR a companion of a guest with reduced mobility (caregiver, accessibility helper). When checked, the age limit above becomes informational.
manage.unit_numbers_hint: Optional. Receptionists pick from this pool when assigning bookings.
manage.unit_numbers_desc: Paste all unit numbers separated by commas or new lines. e.g. t.03, t.04, t.12, t.32 — for a Junior Suite type with quantity 4.
manage.long_stay_hint: Optional. Catches digital nomads + monthly travellers.
manage.long_stay_desc: Set a monthly rate for stays of ≥ N nights. STAYLO auto-applies the better of (daily × nights) vs (monthly_rate × nights / 30) — guests with long stays pay less, you fill the room.
manage.hourly_hint: Optional. Day-use guests, layovers, short stays.
manage.hourly_desc: Set a flat per-hour price (and/or a half-day block rate). When a guest books for fewer hours than your day-use cap, the cheaper of (hourly × hours) vs day_use_rate wins automatically.
manage.linked_packages_desc: Tick any package to bundle it with this room. Qty defaults to the room capacity (1 unit per guest); change it manually for couple-only or family-only packages.
manage.media_after_save: Save the room first, then re-open it to upload photos and videos for this specific room type.

home_grid.empty_title: Onboarding the first hotels of Koh Phangan
home_grid.empty_desc: Featured properties will appear here as hoteliers complete their listing. Want yours to be first ?

app.shift_editor.scope_hint_timing: Saving will apply Start / End / Break / Outlet to the days selected below.
app.shift_editor.scope_hint_briefing: Saving will write the briefing to the days selected below. Days without an existing shift are skipped.
app.shift_editor.scope_hint_tasks: Saving will clone today\'s tasks to the days selected below. Tasks already present on a target day are not duplicated.

verify.gate_generic: You need a verified email to continue.
verify.gate_security: This protects you and the hoteliers you interact with.
verify.success_desc: Taking you back to where you were…
verify.pending_desc: We sent a confirmation link to
verify.tip: Click the link in the email to activate your account. Check your spam folder if you don\'t see it within a couple of minutes.
verify.rate_limit: Please wait a minute before requesting another email.
verify.wrong_email: Wrong email? Sign out and try again

amb.need_addr: Please set your Lightning address first.
amb.no_ready: No commissions ready to withdraw yet.
amb.title: Mes commissions BTC
amb.subtitle: Vous touchez 2% (en BTC) sur chaque réservation des hôtels que vous avez référés. Pour la vie.
amb.ln_help: Pas de Lightning Address ? Téléchargez Wallet of Satoshi (gratuit, 30 sec) pour en créer une.

lightning.title: Pay with Bitcoin Lightning
lightning.expired_desc: Lightning invoices expire after 1 hour. Generate a new one to retry.

chat.error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.

banking.title: Banking & Payouts
banking.subtitle: Get paid in your local currency, directly to your bank account. Powered by Stripe Connect.
banking.returned_desc: We are syncing your account status. This may take a few seconds.
banking.start_title: Set up payouts to your bank
banking.start_desc: STAYLO uses Stripe Connect Express to pay you securely. The setup takes 5 minutes — you only need your ID, business info, and bank details.
banking.step1: Choose your country (defines your default currency).
banking.step2: Verify your identity on Stripe (ID + selfie).
banking.step3: Add your bank account for payouts.
banking.step4: Done — start receiving 90% of every booking, paid the day after check-out.
banking.active_title: You are ready to receive payouts
banking.active_desc: 90% of every guest payment is transferred to your bank account 24 hours after the booking is confirmed (or sooner once the post-checkout questionnaire is wired in).
banking.progress_desc: Stripe is reviewing your information. You may need to provide additional documents — click "Complete onboarding" above to check what is missing.
banking.restricted_desc: Stripe has restricted some capabilities of your account. Click "Complete onboarding" to resolve.
banking.footer: Secured by Stripe — STAYLO never sees your card or banking details.

bookings.incoming_subtitle: Bookings made on your properties — guest contact, dates, special requests.
bookings.trips_subtitle: Your reservations as a traveler — past and upcoming trips.
bookings.no_incoming_desc: Lorsqu\'un voyageur réservera dans vos propriétés, ils apparaîtront ici.
bookings.no_bookings_desc: Commencez à explorer des hôtels et faites votre première réservation.

pms.add_first: Register your first property to access the PMS.
pms.add_rooms_first: Add rooms in Property Management to use the Front Desk.
pms.click_to_manage: Click to view calendar / check in a guest
pms.err_name: At least the lead guest first name is required
pms.err_conflict: These dates overlap an existing booking
pms.hk_note: Housekeeping statuses are saved locally for now. Database persistence coming soon.
pms.reports_subtitle: Key performance metrics for your properties
